title: Sephadex/Sephacryl Purification of AFLP Products
author: Michal Ronikier
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rq8d5zw

steps.title: Put the Sephacryl bottle on the...
steps.instruction: Put the Sephacryl bottle on the shaker for 5-10 minutes, adjust speed to 4-5 to make it liquid. For the last minute add also the Sephadex mixture bottle and decrease the speed to 3-4.

steps.title: Prepare a 1:1 (v/v) solution of...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 1:1 (v/v) solution of pre-prepared 5% Sephadex G50 and Sephacryl S200 (35 ml of each) and mix well.

steps.title: Pipet 300 µl of the mixture...
steps.instruction: Pipet 300 µl of the mixture to each well of the Millipore purification plate.NOTE: Use the Matrix electronic pipet >> Fill at 1250 µl, Disp at 300 µl).

steps.title: Place the Millipore plates on trash plates
steps.instruction: Place the Millipore plates on trash plates.

steps.title: Centrifugate 1 min at 2800 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifugate 1 min at 2800 rpm.Purification of AFLP products

steps.title: Match and place the prepared purification...
steps.instruction: Match and place the prepared purification plates (Millipore plates with fresh Sephadex/Sephacryl layer prepared as described above) on new Eppendorf plates. describe the contents of the Eppendorf plate beforehand. double-check carefully the orientation of the two plates! fix the two plates additionally with small pieces of tape on both sides.

steps.title: Pipet the whole volume of the...
steps.instruction: Pipet the whole volume of the selective PCR product onto the centre of Sephadex/Sephacryl membranes without touching the membranes (using multichannel pipette).

steps.title: Remove the Millipore plate and use...
steps.instruction: Remove the Millipore plate and use the filtrated PCR product in the Eppendorf plate for subsequent dilution of the selective PCR product.

steps.title: Prepare the mix of 10 µl...
steps.instruction: Prepare the mix of 10 µl of Hi-Di formamide and 0.1 µl of Gene Scan-500 ROX size standard per sample and pipet 1-1.5 µl of the purified and diluted PCR product. Millipore plates can be reused up to three times. Leave the Sephadex resin to dry in ambient temperature – it will contract and become easy to remove. Then, plates can be loaded with a new Sephadex/Sephacryl mixture.
